title: pilosella piloselloides
intro: Pilosella piloselloides, also known as false hawk's beard, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine. Pilosella piloselloides is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture form or as a dried herb to make herbal preparations.
